rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be scoped to the owning component and use only visible identifiers from the AADL model
Assumptions and guarantees belong in component type annexes; assignments belong in implementation annexes
generic_rules: Use only named constants or concrete bounds in type-level assumptions and guarantees
Output dependency guarantees must relate visible inputs to visible outputs
Assignments in implementation scope must target existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Valid AGREE syntax includes assume/guarantee statements, equation declarations, and constant assignments
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables
Do not invent or copy identifiers from examples; use only exact names from the model index
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters not exposed as typed ports or constants
